column.text:
• Detroit Tigers placed RF Wenceel Pérez on the 10-day injured list with a left orbital fracture.
• Texas Rangers transferred CF Michael Helman to the 60-day injured list with a right finger fracture.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Arizona Diamondbacks placed RHP Ryne Nelson on the 15-day injured list with a strained right elbow.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Tampa Bay Rays designated outfielder Austin Slater for assignment after activating Jonny DeLuca.
• Cincinnati Reds sent SS Elly De La Cruz on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Louisville.
• New York Mets sent SS Francisco Lindor on a rehab assignment to Double-A Binghamton.
• Seattle Mariners designated infielder Miles Mastrobuoni for assignment to clear a roster spot.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
